ABOUT US

Careers at Sensenbrenner Hospital
Join the
Sensenbrenner Hospital Team!

Join our team at Sensenbrenner Hospital and be part of a dynamic and patient-focused organization. Sensenbrenner Hospital is a leading healthcare provider dedicated to offering high-quality and compassionate care to our community. We pride ourselves on our commitment to excellence and our supportive work environment for our staff.

What we offer:

Competitive salary and comprehensive benefits package, subject to eligibility and employment status.

Health Care of Ontario Pension Plan (HOOPP)

​Opportunities for on-site training and professional development.

Employee and Family Assistance Program (EFAP) and wellness initiatives.

Support with relocation expenses, subject to hospital policy.

Collaborative and inclusive work environment. ​​
 

​Learn more about moving to Kapuskasing: 

https://www.kapuskasing.ca/home-property-community/moving-to-kapuskasing/​

How to Apply

Thank you for your interest in working for Sensenbrenner Hospital. If you wish to apply for an employment opportunity, please  upload your resume and a cover letter using the online application form below, or via email to careers@senhosp.ca for the listed competitions.

​

We encourage you to follow us on Facebook and LinkedIn for updates and to check back regularly on our website for new job postings and opportunities.

​
